subject: ap-calculus-ab
title: Volume of Solids
stimulus: Let $f$ and $g$ be the functions given by $f(x) = 1 + \sin(\pi x)$ and $g(x) = 4^{-x}$. Let $R$ be the shaded region in the first quadrant enclosed by the graphs of $f$ and $g$. Let $S$ be the shaded region in the first quadrant enclosed by the graphs of $f$, $g$, and the $y$-axis, as shown in the figure above.

parts.prompt: Find the volume of the solid generated when $S$ is revolved about the horizontal line $y = -1$.
rubric_criteria: Find the volume of the solid generated when $S$ is revolved about the horizontal line $y = -1$.
